assertions.assertion: Configures both AddJwtBearer and AddOAuth2Introspection handlers
assertions.rationale: Code configures both AddJwtBearer("token", ...) and AddOAuth2Introspection("introspection", ...)

assertions.assertion: Uses ForwardReferenceToken (via Selector.ForwardReferenceToken) to route reference tokens to the introspection handler
assertions.rationale: Code uses Selector.ForwardReferenceToken("introspection") with the using Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer import

assertions.assertion: The scheme name passed to ForwardReferenceToken matches the scheme name used in AddOAuth2Introspection
Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler

assertions.rationale: Includes dotnet add package Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer and the using statement
